---
title: &TITLE Robert Stanley
last: Stanley
first: Robert
subtitle: "Performance Consultant/Coach Developer"
people_group: "external"
email: "your@email.com"
education:
  - "PhD: Coaching and Performance Analysis <br> MSc Exercise and Nutrition Science <br> BA: Politics and International Relations" 
description: "This is not used in this template"
image: 1738146852906.jpg
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
about: 
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: 1738146852906.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your@email.com
editor: 'source'
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}
:::

<br>

## Background & Research Interests

Rob has a long history in sports analytics and performance coaching, including;

Performance Scientist, Japan Cycling Federation. Men's Track Endurance Coach, USA Cycling. Performance Consultant/Coach Developer, Rapid Training/ Rapid Honda. Committee Member, Expertise and Skill Acquisition Network.

Rob's research interests include;

Developing understanding of complicated and complex systems in performance and sport. Using prior knowledge to inform posterior learnings. Measuring and modelling performance to inform coaching practice. Racing sports, particularly those on two wheels.

## {{< meta first >}}' blogs

::: {#blogs}
:::

<br>

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
